channel.title: Hacktoberfest on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Hacktoberfest on Arrans github.io

item.title: lingdojo/kana-dojo
item.description: Aesthetic, minimalist platform for learning Japanese inspired by Duolingo and Monkeytype, built with Next.js and sponsored by Vercel. Beginner-friendly with plenty of good first issues - all contributions are welcome!

item.title: mattermost-community/focalboard
item.description: Focalboard is an open source, self-hosted alternative to Trello, Notion, and Asana.

item.title: paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
item.description: A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents

item.title: huggingface/transformers
item.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

item.title: portainer/portainer
item.description: Making Docker and Kubernetes management easy.

item.title: roboflow/supervision
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: gentoo/gentoo
item.description: [MIRROR] Official Gentoo ebuild repository

item.title: mealie-recipes/mealie
item.description: Mealie is a self hosted recipe manager and meal planner with a RestAPI backend and a reactive frontend application built in Vue for a pleasant user experience for the whole family. Easily add recipes into your database by providing the url and mealie will automatically import the relevant data or add a family recipe with the UI editor

item.title: jellyfin/jellyfin
item.description: The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

item.title: flxzt/rnote
item.description: Sketch and take handwritten notes.

item.title: termux/termux-packages
item.description: A package build system for Termux.

item.title: eosphoros-ai/DB-GPT
item.description: open-source agentic AI data assistant for the next generation of AI + Data products.

item.title: argoproj/argo-cd
item.description: Declarative Continuous Deployment for Kubernetes

item.title: mattermost/mattermost
item.description: Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: swisskyrepo/PayloadsAllTheThings
item.description: A list of useful payloads and bypass for Web Application Security and Pentest/CTF

item.title: monicahq/monica
item.description: Personal CRM. Remember everything about your friends, family and business relationships.

item.title: RocketChat/Rocket.Chat
item.description: The Secure CommsOS™ for mission-critical operations

item.title: oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy
item.description: A reverse proxy that provides authentication with Google, Azure, OpenID Connect and many more identity providers.

item.title: pingcap/tidb
item.description: TiDB - the open-source, cloud-native, distributed SQL database designed for modern applications.

item.title: ellisonleao/magictools
item.description: 🎮 📝 A list of Game Development resources to make magic happen.

item.title: Jackett/Jackett
item.description: API Support for your favorite torrent trackers

item.title: meshery/meshery
item.description: Meshery, the cloud native manager

item.title: compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer
item.description: Run compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly

item.title: charmbracelet/bubbletea
item.description: A powerful little TUI framework 🏗

item.title: resend/react-email
item.description: 💌 Build and send emails using React

item.title: nocodb/nocodb
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 A Free & Self-hostable Airtable Alternative

item.title: sharkdp/fd
item.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to ‘find’

item.title: novuhq/novu
item.description: The open-source notification infrastructure. In-app Inbox component, E-mail, SMS, Push and Slack Integrations.

item.title: nim-lang/Nim
item.description: Nim is a statically typed compiled systems programming language. It combines successful concepts from mature languages like Python, Ada and Modula. Its design focuses on efficiency, expressiveness, and elegance (in that order of priority).

item.title: fwdcloudsec/granted
item.description: The easiest way to access AWS.

item.title: wallabag/wallabag
item.description: wallabag is a self hostable application for saving web pages: Save and classify articles. Read them later. Freely.

item.title: facebook/docusaurus
item.description: Easy to maintain open source documentation websites.

item.title: cert-manager/cert-manager
item.description: Automatically provision and manage TLS certificates in Kubernetes

item.title: TeamPiped/Piped
item.description: An alternative privacy-friendly YouTube frontend which is efficient by design.

item.title: sdmg15/Best-websites-a-programmer-should-visit
item.description: 🔗 Some useful websites for programmers.

item.title: iv-org/invidious
item.description: Invidious is an alternative front-end to YouTube

item.title: Nheko-Reborn/nheko
item.description: Desktop client for Matrix using Qt and C++20.

item.title: matrix-org/dendrite
item.description: Dendrite is a second-generation Matrix homeserver written in Go!

item.title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
item.description: A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

item.title: dexidp/dex
item.description: OpenID Connect (OIDC) identity and OAuth 2.0 provider with pluggable connectors

item.title: flameshot-org/flameshot
item.description: Powerful yet simple to use screenshot software 🖥️ 📸

item.title: beetbox/beets
item.description: music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger

item.title: containerd/containerd
item.description: An open and reliable container runtime

item.title: elkowar/eww
item.description: ElKowars wacky widgets

item.title: ruffle-rs/ruffle
item.description: A Flash Player emulator written in Rust

item.title: caarlos0/svu
item.description: semantic version utility

item.title: dundee/gdu
item.description: Fast disk usage analyzer with console interface written in Go

item.title: golang-migrate/migrate
item.description: Database migrations. CLI and Golang library.

item.title: muesli/duf
item.description: Disk Usage/Free Utility - a better ‘df’ alternative

item.title: WerWolv/ImHex
item.description: 🔍 A Hex Editor for Reverse Engineers, Programmers and people who value their retinas when working at 3 AM.

item.title: tikv/tikv
item.description: Distributed transactional key-value database, originally created to complement TiDB

item.title: orhun/git-cliff
item.description: A highly customizable Changelog Generator that follows Conventional Commit specifications ⛰️

item.title: Freika/dawarich
item.description: Your favorite self-hostable alternative to Google Timeline (Google Location History)

item.title: spotDL/spotify-downloader
item.description: Download your Spotify playlists and songs along with album art and metadata (from YouTube if a match is found).

item.title: PowerShell/PowerShell
item.description: PowerShell for every system!

item.title: Tikam02/DevOps-Guide
item.description: DevOps Guide - Development to Production all configurations with basic notes to debug efficiently.

item.title: Canop/dysk
item.description: A linux utility to get information on filesystems, like df but better

item.title: sakofchit/system.css
item.description: A design system for building retro Apple interfaces

item.title: caarlos0/env
item.description: A simple, zero-dependencies library to parse environment variables into structs

item.title: Leantime/leantime
item.description: Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

item.title: gentoo/portage
item.description: [MIRROR] Package management system

item.title: sandstorm-io/sandstorm
item.description: Sandstorm is a self-hostable web productivity suite. It’s implemented as a security-hardened web app package manager. | Actively sponsored by our friends at TestMu AI

item.title: devicons/devicon
item.description: Set of icons representing programming languages, designing & development tools

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: Ebazhanov/linkedin-skill-assessments-quizzes
item.description: Full reference of LinkedIn answers 2024 for skill assessments (aws-lambda, rest-api, javascript, react, git, html, jquery, mongodb, java, Go, python, machine-learning, power-point) linkedin excel test lösungen, linkedin machine learning test LinkedIn test questions and answers

item.title: yorukot/superfile
item.description: Pretty fancy and modern terminal file manager

item.title: pterm/pterm
item.description: ✨ PTerm is a modern Go module to easily beautify console output. Featuring charts, progressbars, tables, trees, text input, select menus and much more 🚀 It’s completely configurable and 100% cross-platform compatible.

item.title: bluefireteam/audioplayers
item.description: A Flutter package to play multiple audio files simultaneously (Android/iOS/web/Linux/Windows/macOS)

item.title: axel-download-accelerator/axel
item.description: Lightweight CLI download accelerator

item.title: CalcProgrammer1/OpenRGB
item.description: Open source RGB lighting control that doesn’t depend on manufacturer software. Supports Windows, Linux, MacOS. Mirror of https://gitlab.com/CalcProgrammer1/OpenRGB. Releases can be found on GitLab.

item.title: prateekmedia/pstube
item.description: Watch and download videos without ads

item.title: LycheeOrg/Lychee
item.description: A great looking and easy-to-use photo-management-system you can run on your server, to manage and share photos.

item.title: flawiddsouza/Restfox
item.description: Offline-First Minimalistic HTTP & Socket Testing Client for the Web & Desktop

item.title: eficode-academy/git-katas
item.description: A set of exercises for deliberate Git Practice

item.title: wneessen/go-mail
item.description: 📧 Easy to use, yet comprehensive library for sending mails with Go

item.title: vn7n24fzkq/github-profile-summary-cards
item.description: A tool to generate your GitHub summary card for profile README

item.title: dutchcoders/transfer.sh
item.description: Easy and fast file sharing from the command-line.

item.title: go-sprout/sprout
item.description: From sprig to sprout - Useful template functions for Go templates with steroids

item.title: projectdiscovery/httpx
item.description: httpx is a fast and multi-purpose HTTP toolkit that allows running multiple probes using the retryablehttp library.

item.title: requestly/requestly
item.description: Free and open-source API Client & Interceptor.

item.title: go-shiori/shiori
item.description: Simple bookmark manager built with Go

item.title: github-aws-runners/terraform-aws-github-runner
item.description: Terraform module for scalable GitHub action runners on AWS

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (KDBX 3 and KDBX 4) compatible.

item.title: SolidInvoice/SolidInvoice
item.description: Simple and elegant invoicing solution.

item.title: gameyfin/gameyfin
item.description: Manage your video games.

item.title: moderncv/moderncv
item.description: A modern curriculum vitae class for LaTeX

item.title: Southclaws/storyden
item.description: With a fresh new take on traditional bulletin board forum software, Storyden is a modern, secure and extensible platform for building communities.

item.title: foss42/apidash
item.description: API Dash is a beautiful AI-powered open-source cross-platform (Desktop & Mobile) API Client built using Flutter which can help you easily create & customize your HTTP & GraphQL API requests, visually inspect responses and generate API integration code. A lightweight alternative to postman/insomnia.

item.title: Unmanic/unmanic
item.description: Unmanic - Library Optimiser

item.title: linagora/tmail-flutter
item.description: A multi-platform (Flutter) application for reading your emails, with your favorite devices, using the JMAP protocol!

item.title: probonopd/go-appimage
item.description: Go implementation of AppImage tools

item.title: hugo-themes/toha
item.description: A Hugo theme for personal portfolio

item.title: YACReader/yacreader
item.description: This repo contains the code of YACReader’s desktop version.

item.title: slurdge/goeland
item.description: An alternative to rss2email written in golang with many filters

item.title: cxong/cdogs-sdl
item.description: Classic overhead run-and-gun game

item.title: gentoo/guru
item.description: [MIRROR] GURU: repository of new packages maintained collaboratively by users

item.title: lwindolf/liferea
item.description: Liferea (Linux Feed Reader), a news reader for GTK/GNOME

item.title: containrrr/shoutrrr
item.description: Notification library for gophers and their furry friends.

item.title: keshav-space/safenotes
item.description: Safe Notes is a security project aimed at providing an encrypted, private note manager that works locally and protects notes from various threat actors.
